refnamediv.refpurpose: Computes the portion of a geometry falling within a rectangle.

refsection.title: Description
refsection.para: Clips a geometry by a 2D box in a fast and tolerant but possibly invalid way. Topologically invalid input geometries do not result in exceptions being thrown. The output geometry is not guaranteed to be valid (in particular, self-intersections for a polygon may be introduced).

refsection.title: Examples
refsection.programlisting: -- Rely on implicit cast from geometry to box2d for the second parameter SELECT ST_ClipByBox2D(geom, ST_MakeEnvelope(0,0,10,10)) FROM mytab;
